channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Leaning lamp post, 21st May
item.description:
A vehicle has hit this lamp post this morning and left it leaning at a 45 degree angle across resident drive, it looks unstable and needs urgent attention.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wansunt Road, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose planks and exposed nails on wooden steps next to slide, 21st May
item.description:
There are loose planks which move as children step on them, with a risk of injury such as toes getting trapped between planks; as well as exposed nails which again are a serious injury risk.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensbridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 black bags on grass, 21st May
item.description:
2 black bags of rubbish left on opening between Rancliffe and Westhorne Avenue.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westhorne Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Foliage obstructing traffic signals, 21st May
item.description:
Foliage Still obscuring aspect.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Romford Road, Little Ilford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds, 21st May
item.description:
Weeds and plants over growing in alleyway, access is required for office, dance studio and residents. Photos taken in front of Eco Approach office (182a High Street) facing the road (High Street)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leather Alley, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree next to 76 Fendyke Rd, Sidcup rubbing against roof, 21st May
item.description:
Next to my property is a dyke which is owned by Bexley council. There is a large tree in the dyke that is always rubbing against the roof of my property. It is really noisy and actually wakes us up. I am also worried about any potential damage to the roof. Someone came to trim the tree before as it was hitting my daughters bedroom window but it is also the top part that needs trimming. Could someone look into it please?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fendyke Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Items flytipped, 21st May
item.description:
Mattress, part of prams, wooden pallets etc left here for a few months now. Pictures taken from in front of office Eco Approach (182a High Street) facing the road (High Street)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leather Alley, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Coventry Close, 21st May
item.description:
I am others have reported this before but the reports are closed with no further action and meaningless letters BHM. The rubbish is all over Coventry Road and the homeless encampment is growing attracting more and more people into an area with no facilities. This is becoming a public health issue can we get a proper reply as to why the council are not addressing this

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coventry Close, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Outside 21 Boswell Street, 21st May
item.description:
The 20mph speed sign is high up on the pole and as it is behind the tree with overhanging branches, it is not completely visible. Please re-position the speed sign plate so it can be seen easily. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Boswell Street, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti build up Thames path, 21st May
item.description:
Many tags on tiled surface in tunnel next to Dogett’s pub along Thames path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackfriars Bridge, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrowing vegetation starting to block pavement, 21st May
item.description:
Vegetation needs cutting back to allow safe travel on the pavement. Some sections are pushing pedestrians almost into the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crockenhill Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Again fly tipping, 21st May
item.description:
We need camera and prosecute people who don’t care about our area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 406, Downham Way, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lost cement around drain cover, 21st May
item.description:
The edging around the drain cover has gone and is a trip hazard. Son fell face first off his scooter going past. Also saw someone 30 seconds later have a fall on exact same spot.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich Church Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: So much litter, 21st May
item.description:
Since the really bad windy weather when the bins all blew over, the litter is still everywhere. The household opposite us have so many people living in their house that their plastic bin and rubbish bin over flows and their rubbish goes everywhere and they do nothing about it. I refuse to litter pick again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazel Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Other Business putting food waste in recycling bin, 21st May
item.description:
As a food business we do not put shop food waste in external bins it either gets taken back by the business or donated to outlet. To mitigate against Pest Issues. A local business is putting food waste in our locked Recycling Bin suggesting they have their own key for these Bins. As seen from the pictures. Creating Pest Issues in the local area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Regal Alley, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree lying directly on the thames path- fire hazard, 21st May
item.description:
This tree has been on the Thames path for the last 3 weeks or longer.It is dry now and will easily caught fire now as the temperature is rising. There are abandoned glas bottles and shattered glas in the tree posing hazard and fire danger.It poses immediate danger of fire.Has to be removed before fire will break out

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Resolution Walk, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Badly covered manhole in pavement, 21st May
item.description:
This has been here for several months and is appalling covered. It has been reported to the council and they say they can do nothing. Apparently it’s Thames Water. The covers are insufficient and uneven and the side can not be used by people in wheelchairs or the elderly with walkers etc.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 169, Main Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At least 2o bags of putrefying chicken dumped, 21st May
item.description:
On Monday about 3pm a van dumped a fridge full of putrefying chicken onto the bin station in the middle of Gascoyne One Estate. It can be smelled as far away on Cassland Road and is a serious health hazard to children playing nearby and all residents.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gascoyne Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging trees causing nuisance, damage and lack of light, 21st May
item.description:
Over hanging trees now damaging the decking, fence and all plant life. reduction in sunlight into the garden and rear of house.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Victoria Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The cleaning seems, 21st May
item.description:
The cleaning seems to be incomplete

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beresford Drive, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
